title: Benefits of Wireless LAN Controller
subtitle: Why enterprises deploy Cisco Wireless LAN Controllers

items.title: Centralized Management
items.desc: Manage hundreds of access points from a single controller without configuring each AP individually.

items.title: Seamless Roaming
items.desc: Clients move between access points without dropping voice calls or active sessions.

items.title: Enhanced Security
items.desc: Supports WPA3, 802.1X authentication, RADIUS integration and rogue AP detection.

items.title: Scalability
items.desc: Easily supports large campus deployments with centralized policy enforcement.

items.title: RF Optimization
items.desc: Automatically adjusts channels and transmit power to improve wireless performance.

items.title: High Availability
items.desc: Provides controller redundancy and AP failover for continuous network availability.
